scripts.release:check: pnpm run lint && pnpm run typecheck && pnpm run test
scripts.release:dry-run:next: pnpm release:plan --tag next --dry-run && pnpm release:build && pnpm release:pack && pnpm release:verify && pnpm release:publish:npm --tag next --dry-run && pnpm release:vsix --dry-run
scripts.release:next: pnpm release:plan --tag next && pnpm release:build && pnpm release:pack && pnpm release:verify && pnpm release:publish:npm --tag next && pnpm release:vsix
scripts.release:dry-run:latest: pnpm release:plan --tag latest --dry-run && pnpm release:build && pnpm release:pack && pnpm release:verify && pnpm release:publish:npm --tag latest --dry-run && pnpm release:vsix --dry-run
scripts.release:latest: pnpm release:plan --tag latest && pnpm release:build && pnpm release:pack && pnpm release:verify && pnpm release:publish:npm --tag latest && pnpm release:vsix
